original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch on dark paper, depicting a rounded, dome-like object with a flattened base. The sketch is in white or light-colored ink. A vertical dimension is marked as "6' to 8'". A horizontal dimension across the base is marked as "20'". An arrow points to hatched lines on the right slope of the object, with a handwritten annotation: "NOTED SHADOW." Below the sketch, centered: "(Ration approx. 3:1)". In the lower right corner: "/s/ Russell J. Carey Jr., / RUSSELL J. CAREY JR. / 1st Lt., USAF / Intel Officer". In the lower left margin, handwritten: "93". In the right margin, handwritten: "157". The word "CONFIDENTIAL" is stamped at the top and bottom of the page, both crossed out with a diagonal line.

elements.description: The word 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamped at the top and bottom of the page, with a horizontal line drawn through the top stamp. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top.

A white-line sketch on a dark background depicting a saucer-shaped object. Handwritten annotations on the sketch include a vertical dimension arrow labeled '6 to 8'', a horizontal dimension arrow labeled '20'', the text '(Ration approx. 3:1)' below the horizontal line, and an arrow pointing to the object's base with the text 'NOTED SHADOW'. In the bottom right corner of the image, typed text reads '/s/ Russell J. Carye Jr., RUSSELL J. CAREY JR., 1st Lt., USAF, Intel Officer'.

judge.reason: The descriptions disagree on the location of the 'NOTED SHADOW' text, the signature line's spelling (Carey vs. Carye), and the description of the 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamp crossing.
